subcodes.title: Words to a Persian prince, spoken on 1913-02-21
subcodes.first_line: Mirza Taqi Khan was the ablest and most astute statesman that Persia had produced for a long time. Although he committed the greatest mistake of his life
subcodes.subjects: @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @past, present and future of Iran
